title: Danger Mod
description: Alerts you when any players that arent on your list enter your render distance. Add and remove teammates from your list to not be pinged if they are nearby.
body:
# Get alerted when unwanted players are nearby!
When anyone that is NOT on your list are within your render distance, you get messaged in chat who is nearby.
## How To Use:
After placing the mod in your mods folder, you will have access to the following commands in-game:
- ### /danger add (name):
This will add the chosen player into your list.
- ### /danger list
This will tell you all of the players in your list.
- ### /danger remove (name):
This will remove the chosen player from your list.

## Keybinds:
- ### Toggle Check:
Toggles if you are checking for nearby players
- ### Change Mode:
Cycles between 2 modes. Currently SPAM and SINGLE. SPAM sends a ping every second. SINGLE sends a ping once, then must be turned on again.
- ### Show Binds:
Shows all binds, and any important info such as mode or if you are checking.

## WARNING
Any players outside of your render distance will not ping you, and you can not get their coordinates.

## Future versions:
- Add a keybind to put the warning + the players coordinates
- Add how many nearby players
- Add a GUI to show all nearby players (no ping)
